ddls:
CREATE TABLE "absentee_votes" (
  "absentee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee vote record */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the precinct */,
  "absentee_count" INTEGER /* Total absentee votes counted */,
  "absentee_method" TEXT /* Method of absentee voting used */,
  "total_ballots" INTEGER /* Total ballots cast during absentee voting */,
  "total_early_absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Total early absentee votes counted */,
  "total_in_person_absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Total in-person absentee votes counted */,
  "total_mail_in_absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Total mail-in absentee votes counted */,
  "total_absentee_voting_methods" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of absentee voting methods used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absentee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provisional_votes" (
  "provisional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provisional vote record */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the precinct */,
  "provisional_count" INTEGER /* Total provisional votes counted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the provisional votes */,
  "total_provisional_in_person_votes" INTEGER /* Total in-person provisional votes counted */,
  "total_provisional_absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Total absentee provisional votes counted */,
  "total_provisional_early_votes" INTEGER /* Total early provisional votes counted */,
  "total_provisional_voting_methods" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of provisional voting methods used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provisional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the candidate */,
  "race_id" TEXT /* ID of the race (e.g., presidential, senatorial) */,
  "district_id" TEXT /* ID of the district (e.g., congressional district) */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "campaign_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the candidate's campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" TEXT /* Party ID */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_logo" TEXT /* URL of the party's logo */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "party_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the turnout record */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the precinct */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "total_voted_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who cast their votes */,
  "turnout_source" TEXT /* Source of the turnout data (e.g., election officials, voter registration records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_status" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the precinct */,
  "reporting_status" TEXT /* Current reporting status (e.g., reported, pending) */,
  "last_reported" TEXT /* Last reported timestamp */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the reporting data (e.g., election officials, automated systems) */,
  "report_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the reported data (e.g., confirmed, estimated) */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes on the reporting status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the registration record */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "total_new_registrations" INTEGER /* Total number of new voter registrations */,
  "total_deregistrations" INTEGER /* Total number of voter deregistrations */,
  "registration_source" TEXT /* Source of the registration data (e.g., election officials, online systems) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_ballots" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee ballot record */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the precinct */,
  "total_absentee_ballots" INTEGER /* Total absentee ballots issued */,
  "total_early_ballots" INTEGER /* Total early absentee ballots issued */,
  "total_in_person_ballots" INTEGER /* Total in-person absentee ballots issued */,
  "total_mail_in_ballots" INTEGER /* Total mail-in absentee ballots issued */,
  "ballot_source" TEXT /* Source of the absentee ballot data (e.g., election officials, automated systems) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the meta record */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the election is held */,
  "total_precincts" INTEGER /* Total number of precincts in the state */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the state */,
  "total_voted_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who cast their votes in the state */,
  "total_absentee_ballots" INTEGER /* Total number of absentee ballots issued in the state */,
  "total_provisional_ballots" INTEGER /* Total number of provisional ballots issued in the state */,
  "election_source" TEXT /* Source of the election metadata (e.g., election officials, automated systems) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id")
)
